Night Shift

Turno nocturno

"There's no cure for this evil."

6.4
2024MOVIERReleased

Synopsis

A young nurse with a domestic abuse past starts working the night shift at a small hospital, where, during the night, the ghost of a nurse materializes.

Tags

night shiftmexico city, mexicohospitalghostbased on myths, legends or folklorenursesghost nurse
